item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Aromatic paprika stew made with turkey andplenty of vegetables, served with brown rice, caramelized pearl onions, andtopped with fresh herb salad. (6+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Creamy Italian pasta alla Norcina with spicedturkey sausage and mushrooms, topped with cheese and fresh herbs. Served witharugula salad tossed in lemon vinaigrette. (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: Creamy Italian pasta alla Norcinawith spiced tempeh and mushrooms, topped with cheese and fresh herbs. Servedwith arugula salad tossed in lemon vinaigrette. (1+2+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Mamma Mia –Porchetta roast with warm potato salad packed with fresh herbs and toastedalmonds. GREEN DISH: Cabbagedolma filled with white bean farce seasoned with fresh herbs, served with warmpotato salad with fresh herbs and toasted almonds. Sign up for Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m.

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Fiskefrikadeller med bløde kartofler, klassisk selleri-remoulade og citronbåde. GREEN DISH: Vegetardeller med kartofler, selleri-remoulade og citronbåde. Sign up for Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Build-your-ownpork roast burger with homemade red cabbage, pickled cucumbers, and mustardmayo. (1+2+11) GREEN DISH: Build-your-own veggie burger with homemade red cabbage, pickledcucumbers, and mustard mayo. (1+2+11) Sign up for Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m.
